parents.subject: LU-18222 doc: update man page with lqa_quota_ops

commit.subject: LU-19644 tests: make sanity/150ib robust on extent-based fs
commit.message:
LU-19644 tests: make sanity/150ib robust on extent-based fs

On extent-backed filesystems, stat block counts can vary due to
extent-tree metadata, causing flaky equality checks in test_150ib.
Switch to SEEK_HOLE/SEEK_DATA lseek checks for punch validation,
while keeping strict block-count assertions for indirect mapping.

Test-Parameters: trivial env=ONLY=sanity testlist=sanity-dom
Test-Parameters: trivial env=ONLY=150ib testlist=sanity
Signed-off-by: Keguang Xu <squalfof@gmail.com>
Change-Id: Iaaa9a11e47df20ec9585d094eeaed785ced98dc9
